# feat: solve 110A Nearly Lucky Number

## What
Solve Codeforces 110A (Nearly Lucky Number) in C++ with beginner inline comments.

## Why
To add a new 900-rated problem solution and demonstrate professional workflow with clear code comments for learning.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Solution file created in practice/900/110A-nearly-lucky-number.cpp
- [ ] Code includes inline beginner-friendly comments
- [ ] Passes Codeforces sample tests
